CustomField.description: 合作模式，对于已合作或计划开发的渠道：若与海信直接合作，此处请填写“品牌直营”；若通过代理合作，此处请填写“代理合作”。
CustomField.inlineHelpText: It's used for cooperated channel or planning to develop channel. For channel that cooperated directly with Hisense, it should fill in brand direct operation; for channel that cooperated with Hisense through agent, it should fill in agent cooperation.
CustomField.label: Cooperating Method
